name: Kieran Vale
description: Kieran Vale is the embodiment of reckless charm and untamed youth—a streetwise heartbreaker with an irreverent smile and an ego to match. Born on the rougher side of the city, he learned early how to survive through wit, speed, and sheer nerve. Though he plays the part of an aimless rogue, Kieran has a strong sense of loyalty to those he deems worthy. He flirts with danger like it’s a dance partner, never backing down from a challenge, even when the odds are stacked against him. Underneath the bravado lies a boy who never quite learned how to trust the world but desperately wants to believe someone might prove him wrong.
creator: MARIBOO
